query_name: 検証_ビンゴ施策_シミュレーション_週次進捗ver
query_string:
-- キャンペーン開始日を固定（例：2024-08-10）
-- 90日固定なので、終了日は start + 89日としています
with params as (
  select
    date '2024-11-17' as campaign_start_date,
    date_add('day', 89, date '2024-11-17') as campaign_end_date
)

, target_customers as (
  select
    distinct
    id as customer_id
    , substr(created, 1, 10) as register_date
  from
    _l1_mysql_pos.customers
  where
    substr(created, 1, 10) >= '2024-11-17'
    and substr(created, 1, 10) <= '2025-02-14'
)

, app_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , substr(first_login_date, 1, 10) as first_login_date
  from (
  select
     customer_id
     , min(access_date) as first_login_date
  from
    z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
  group by
    1
)
)

, reservations as (
  select
    t0.customer_id
    , t0.order_id
    , t0.business_date
    , td_time_string(t1.event_unixtime, 'd!', 'jst') as reserve_date
    , max(if(t1.reservation_id is not null, 1, 0)) as appreserve_flag
    , max(if(t2.rate in (1,2), 1, 0)) as review_flag
    , max(if(nomination_fee > 0.0, 1, 0)) as nomination_flag
    , max(if(regexp_like(product_name, '足つぼ') and cast(regexp_extract(product_name, '([0-9]+)') as integer) >= 15, 1, 0)) as foot_flag
    , max(if(product_name in ('マットレス', 'Cool プレミアムマットレス'), 1, 0)) as premiummatt_flag
    , max(if(t0.business_hour in (12,13,14,15,16,17,18) and holiday_type is null and business_dow not in ('土', '日'), 1, 0)) as daytime_flag
    , max(if(treatment_minutes >= 90, 1, 0)) as over90m_flag
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail as t0
  left join
    _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_reserve as t1
      on t0.reservation_id = t1.reservation_id
  left join
    _l1_mysql_hp.reviews as t2
      on t0.order_id = t2.order_id
  left join
    _integration_datamart.mst_datetime as t3
      on t0.business_date = t3.business_date
  group by
    1,2,3,4
)

, order_seq as (
  select
    *
    , min(business_date) over (partition by customer_id) as f1_business_date
    , lead(business_date, 1) over (partition by customer_id order by business_date) as f2_business_date
    , row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by business_date) as order_sequence
  from 
    reservations
)

, merged as (
  select
    customer_id
    , register_date
    , first_login_date
    , order_id
    , business_date
    , reserve_date
    , appreserve_flag
    , review_flag
    , nomination_flag
    , foot_flag
    , premiummatt_flag
    , daytime_flag
    , over90m_flag
    , f1_business_date
    , f2_business_date

    /* 「実質の対象期間」判定（キャンペーン期間 × 会員登録日）*/
    , if(
        first_login_date is not null
        and cast(first_login_date as date)
          between greatest(cast(register_date as date), (select campaign_start_date from params))
              and (select campaign_end_date from params),
        1, 0
      ) as within_cp_login_flag

    , if(
        reserve_date is not null
        and cast(reserve_date as date)
          between greatest(cast(register_date as date), (select campaign_start_date from params))
              and (select campaign_end_date from params),
        1, 0
      ) as within_cp_reserve_flag

    , if(
        business_date is not null
        and cast(business_date as date)
          between greatest(cast(register_date as date), (select campaign_start_date from params))
              and (select campaign_end_date from params),
        1, 0
      ) as within_cp_order_flag

    , if(
        f2_business_date is not null
        and cast(f2_business_date as date)
          between greatest(cast(register_date as date), (select campaign_start_date from params))
              and (select campaign_end_date from params),
        1, 0
      ) as within_cp_f2_flag

  from
    target_customers 
  left join
    order_seq using(customer_id)
  left join
    app_log using(customer_id)
  where
    order_sequence = 1
)

/* 各マスのフラグ＋達成日をまとめる */
, agg_bingo as (
  select
    customer_id
    -- b1: プレミアムマットレス
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and premiummatt_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b1_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and premiummatt_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b1_date
    -- b2: レビュー
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and review_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b2_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and review_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b2_date
    -- b3: 足つぼ30分以上
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and foot_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b3_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and foot_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b3_date
    -- b4: 指名
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and nomination_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b4_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and nomination_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b4_date
    -- b5: F2来店
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_f2_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b5_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_f2_flag = 1 then cast(f2_business_date as date) else null end) as b5_date
    -- b6: アプリ予約
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b6_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 then cast(coalesce(reserve_date, business_date) as date) else null end) as b6_date
    -- b7: 平日昼来店
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and daytime_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b7_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and daytime_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b7_date
    -- b8: ログイン
    , 1 as b8_flag
    , cast('2024-10-01' as date) as b8_date
    -- b9: 90分以上
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and over90m_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as b9_flag
    , max(case when appreserve_flag = 1 and within_cp_order_flag = 1 and over90m_flag = 1 then cast(business_date as date) else null end) as b9_date
  from
    merged
  group by
    1,16,17
)

select
  count(distinct if(b1_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b1_uu
  , count(distinct if(b2_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b2_uu
  , count(distinct if(b3_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b3_uu
  , count(distinct if(b4_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b4_uu
  , count(distinct if(b5_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b5_uu
  , count(distinct if(b6_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b6_uu
  , count(distinct if(b7_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b7_uu
  , count(distinct if(b8_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b8_uu
  , count(distinct if(b9_flag = 1, customer_id)) as b9_uu
  , count(distinct customer_id) as total_uu
from
  agg_bingo
